description: A current student wants to register for an open course for the upcoming semester.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and verify their registration eligibility for the semester.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student has no holds and their registration window is open.

nodes.task_description: Check the availability of the requested course (e.g., 'CS101').

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that the course has open seats.

nodes.task_description: Process the course registration and confirm the updated schedule with the student.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully adds the course to the student's schedule.
